summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Build Engine Phase 2. All 14 tests passed. Verified code generation creates 14+ files, write_to_disk creates actual files on disk, and all generated files have valid syntax (Python, YAML, JSON, SQL).

minor.issue: Generated routes.py has duplicate function names (both GET and POST /tasks use same function name 'tasks')
minor.note: This is a code quality issue in generated code, not a platform bug

POST /api/build/generate - Works with React stack (alternative to Next.js) - PASSED
POST /api/build/write - Writes actual files to /app/generated directory - PASSED
POST /api/build/write - Returns 404 when generate not called first - PASSED
GET /api/build/tree - Returns file tree structure - PASSED
GET /api/build/tree - Returns 404 for non-existent project - PASSED
Disk verification - TaskManager project files exist on disk (15 files) - PASSED

Disk verification - Generated YAML files have valid syntax - PASSED
Disk verification - Generated JSON files have valid syntax - PASSED

E2E workflow - generate → write → verify files on disk - PASSED
GET /api/build/artifacts - Returns list of artifacts - PASSED

critical_code_review_comments: BuildEngine.write_to_disk() correctly creates directories and writes files
Generated Python files (main.py, models.py, routes.py) have valid syntax
Generated YAML files (docker-compose.yml, ci.yml, deploy.yml) are valid
Generated JSON files (package.json, sgp-manifest.json) are valid
Generated SQL schema is valid PostgreSQL syntax
File tree structure correctly represents project hierarchy
Minor: Generated routes.py has duplicate function names for GET/POST endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - tests create and cleanup their own test projects
context_for_next_testing_agent: Build Engine Phase 2 fully tested. POST /api/build/generate creates 14+ code artifacts. POST /api/build/write writes actual files to /app/generated/{project_name}/. GET /api/build/tree returns file tree. All generated files verified to have valid syntax. TaskManager example project exists at /app/generated/TaskManager/ with 15 files.
